message:
🐛 Update marketplace version to 0.2.0

Fixes version mismatch between marketplace.json and plugin.json.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@
       "name": "kubectl-claude",
       "source": "./plugins/kubectl-claude",
       "description": "AI-powered multi-cluster Kubernetes management with RBAC analysis",
-      "version": "0.1.0",
+      "version": "0.2.0",
       "author": {
         "name": "KubeStellar"
       },
